title: OreUI for Everyone
description: Ore UI for Java edition with mod support
body:
# OreUI For Everyone This resource pack brings OreUI to Java Edition and many mods. [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/oreui-for-everyone) ## Repositories: > This project was originally designed for 1.20.1. > > Version 1.21.1 was built by patching the 1.20.1 version using [ShulkerRDK](https://github.com/LiPolymer/ShulkerRDK/). > > If you have any trouble with the 1.21.1 version, please open an issue **in the patch repo**; otherwise, go to the 1.20.1 repo. - 1.20.1: [GitHub](https://github.com/ReConstruction-127/OreUI-For-Everyone-1.20.1) - 1.21.1 patch: [GitLab](https://gitlab.com/LiPolymer/OreUI-For-Everyone-1.21.1) [GitHub](https://github.com/LiPolymer/OreUI-For-Everyone-1.21.1) ## Versioning For the 1.21.1 version, an extra digit will be added to indicate the patch version. ## License This project is licensed under [`AGPLv3`](https://github.com/ReConstruction-127/OreUI-For-Everyone-1.20.1/blob/main/LICENSE).
The upload of the 1.20.1 version was approved by its owner.
